meaning: adj.杂色的,斑驳的,多样化的v.成为杂色
examples: The leaves are a variegated red.
This specimen is richly variegated in color.
The flowers of pansies are often variegated .
Lapus Lapus Island, an easy dive for beginners, has variegated soft corals, spiny lionfish and rainbow-coloured nudibranches (molluscs).
While there is some merit to these criticisms, the actual explanations are more variegated.
